title: Kenaitze Indian Tribe Announces Fixed-Route Bus Service Plans
summary: Central Kenai Peninsula residents and visitors will soon have a new option for reliable, affordable transportation. The Kenaitze Indian Tribe is launching Kahtnu Area Transit, a fixed-route bus service between Nikiski and Sterling. Kahtnu is the Dena’ina word for the Kenai River. “Access to reliable...

title: Sitnasuak Native Corporation Subsidiary Acquires Bennettsville Holdings, LLC
summary: Nome, Alaska | June 13, 2022 – Sitnasuak Native Corporation Subsidiary SNC Technical Services, LLC (“SNCT”) announced the acquisition of Bennettsville Holdings, LLC DBA Bennettsville Printing.
